name: Bandcamp API
what_it_does: Bandcamp fan and artist API for accessing purchase data, fan collections, music catalog metadata, and sales reporting for indie artists.
use_cases: Build artist dashboards showing sales trends, top tracks, and revenue by geographic region
Automate album release notifications by polling new releases from followed artists
Sync fan music collections to personal music management systems
Generate royalty reports and financial summaries for multi-artist labels
Build recommendation engines using Bandcamp genre tags and fan purchase overlap
not_for: Public music discovery or search without artist relationship (Bandcamp API is fan/artist specific)
Streaming audio playback — Bandcamp API does not provide audio stream URLs
High-volume catalog scraping — Bandcamp actively rate-limits aggressive crawlers
best_when: Best for indie artist or label tooling that has a Bandcamp account relationship and needs sales/collection data.
avoid_when: Avoid when you need public music streaming, broad catalog discovery, or real-time audio delivery.

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 for fan and artist APIs. Separate auth flows for fans vs. artists/labels.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for account holders; API access for your own data
pricing.paid_tiers: None for API — Bandcamp takes 15% transaction fee on sales
pricing.notes: API access is free but requires a Bandcamp account. Developer API access limited and not publicly documented.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Limited public documentation — error messages are minimal and often undocumented.
known_agent_gotchas: Bandcamp does not have a fully public API — developer access is limited and requires approval for non-personal use
Rate limits are undocumented and enforced silently — implement conservative backoff (1 req/sec) to avoid IP bans
OAuth tokens expire and Bandcamp does not provide refresh token documentation clearly
Sales data is only available to the artist/label account — fan APIs are limited to collection and wishlist data
The API is not versioned and Bandcamp can change endpoints without notice — monitor for breakage regularly

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth 2.0 but limited scope documentation. No IP allowlisting or advanced security controls.
